license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iapcadn
title: Computational prediction of the molecular mechanisms involved in migration

steps_raw.instruction: Obtain the protein-protein interaction network (PPIN) for Mus musculus from the STRING 10.0 database containing all known and predicted protein-protein interactions.
Superimpose our previous mass spectrometry results of the TMEM30A complex in mouse tissue and the known migration-related genes from the literature onto the PPIN from the STRING database.
Extract the sub-network of these selected proteins from the whole PPIN in STRING.
Use DAVID to conduct the function and pathway enrichment analysis.
Visualize the signaling network with Cytoscape.
